title: Smart Inventory
description: Ingredients are deducted automatically as you sell.

content.title: Real-time Tracking
content.description: Never guess what's in your pantry again. Our system deducts ingredients automatically as soon as an order is placed on the POS. View live stock levels from anywhere in the world and prevent theft or wastage before it happens.
features: Live deduction of ingredients per dish

quote.text: We cut our food waste by 15% in the first month using Yummy's vendor tools.
quote.author: Head Chef, Kathmandu Kitchen

content.title: Streamlined Ordering
content.description: Manage all your suppliers in one place. Generate purchase orders automatically based on par levels and send them via email or WhatsApp directly from the dashboard.

quote.text: We cut our food waste by 15% in the first month using Yummy's vendor tools.
quote.author: Head Chef, Kathmandu Kitchen

content.title: Optimize Your Menu
content.description: Know exactly how much each dish costs to make. Our recipe costing engine accounts for every gram of ingredient, helping you price your menu for maximum profitability.

title: IRD Approved Billing
description: Fully compliant with Tax Rules of Nepal.

content.title: Peace of Mind
content.description: We are officially certified by the Inland Revenue Department of Nepal. Our billing system adheres strictly to all electronic billing procedures, ensuring you are always audit-ready without the stress.
features: Real-time data sync with IRD servers

quote.text: Billing used to be a headache. Now it's just one click.

title: Digital QR Menu
description: Contactless ordering for superior guest experience.

content.title: Increase Ticket Size
content.description: Our digital menu suggests pairings and add-ons automatically. Use high-quality photos to tempt customers and drive higher average order values.

title: Real-time Reports
description: Track sales and performance from anywhere.

content.title: 360° Business View
content.description: Access your restaurant's performance metrics from anywhere in the world. Our cloud-based dashboard gives you real-time insights into sales, expenses, and profitability.

content.title: Optimize Operations
content.description: Identify your top-performing staff and busiest hours. Use data to create smarter schedules and incentivize your team effectively.
